description: Product Description Baby Girls Anti-slip Socks With ruffled lace edge, breathable and lightweight, this pair of socks will be perfect with a pair of Mary Jane and dress, suitable for children in bloom, pageant, photography and other daily or special occasions. Cute Ruffle Socks 4 or 6 pairs of cute baby socks in the glazer, perfect for baby arrival, baby shower, Easter gifts, party photos, birthday or everyday clothes! High-quality material These baby girl ankle socks are made of combed cotton to ensure that they are soft and breathable, stretchy and comfortable, respect baby's delicate skin and will not leave marks on their leg. Non-slip stockings prevent babies from falling or slipping when learning to walk or run on hardwood floors or slippery places. They protect the safety of babies and take care of their growth.
